parameters.query:
WITH alumnos_summary AS (
  SELECT 
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN estado IN ('REGISTRADO', 'ACTIVO') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::integer as registrados,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(fecha_registro) >= '{{ $json.query.startDate }}'::date AND DATE(fecha_registro) <= '{{ $json.query.endDate }}'::date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::integer as registrados_mes,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(p.fecha_pago) >= '{{ $json.query.startDate }}'::date AND DATE(p.fecha_pago) <= '{{ $json.query.endDate }}'::date THEN p.monto ELSE 0 END), 0)::numeric as ingresos_mes
  FROM alumnos a
  LEFT JOIN pagos p ON a.id = p.alumno_id
),
leads_summary AS (
  SELECT 
    COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN estado IN ('NUEVO', 'FRIO', 'TIBIO', 'CALIENTE') THEN 1 END), 0)::integer as leads_calificados,
    COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN estado = 'CALIENTE' AND DATE(estado_fecha) >= '{{ $json.query.startDate }}'::date AND DATE(estado_fecha) <= '{{ $json.query.endDate }}'::date THEN 1 END), 0)::integer as leads_nuevos_mes,
    COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN estado IN ('NUEVO', 'FRIO', 'TIBIO', 'CALIENTE') THEN 1 END), 0)::integer as total_leads
  FROM leads
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT registrados FROM alumnos_summary)::integer as registrados,
  (SELECT leads_calificados FROM leads_summary)::integer as leads_calificados,
  (SELECT leads_nuevos_mes FROM leads_summary)::integer as leads_nuevos_mes,
  CASE 
    WHEN (SELECT total_leads FROM leads_summary)::numeric > 0 THEN
      ROUND(100.0 * (SELECT registrados FROM alumnos_summary)::numeric / (SELECT total_leads FROM leads_summary)::numeric, 2)
    ELSE 0
  END::numeric as tasa_conversion_pct,
  (SELECT ingresos_mes FROM alumnos_summary)::numeric as ingresos_mes;
